docs.title: Welcome to MkDocs
docs.text:
This is a new para

For full documentation visit mkdocs.org.

docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
• mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project.
  • mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.
  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
mkdocs.yml    # The configuration file.
docs/
    index.md  # The documentation homepage.
    ...       # Other markdown pages, images and other files.

docs.title: About Me
docs.text: This is the main content of the about page, written in Markdown. It can include lists, links, images, and more.

docs.title: My First Blog Post
docs.text:
This is the introduction to my first post. It will appear on the blog index page as a summary.

This is the rest of the content, which is only visible when you click through to the full post page. Here, you can elaborate with more details, code blocks, and images.
